goal: Compare autonomous_deep and autonomous_steady on a real problem-solving task that genuinely requires bounded first-search before candidate comparison and fallback planning.

shared_task_packet.task_summary: Solve one real task with actual evidence gaps and require explicit retrieval writeback, candidate generation, comparison, validation, implementation steps, and fallback rules.
input_materials: any local files or source materials needed for the task
explicit_constraints: keep the task identical across both runs
allow bounded first-search only when a real evidence gap appears
do not activate runtime/provider/governance operations without explicit operational scope
prefer source-aligned retrieval, generation, evaluation, and fallback shaping
success_criteria: problem is structured before search expands
search evidence writes back into selected targets and candidate generation
candidate comparison and fallback logic are explicit
deep and steady show behavior differences without boundary breakage

deep_prompt: 用 HMM，自治深探。先结构化问题。如果有明显收益概率，就继续做有界检索、候选解生成、比较、验证计划和回退规则，不要过早停下，除非出现真实阻塞。
steady_prompt: 用 HMM，自治稳推。先结构化问题。只有在需求明确或证据足够强时，再继续做有界检索、候选解生成、比较、验证计划和回退规则。避免低收益扩展，除非出现真实阻塞。
observation_focus: whether bounded search is triggered appropriately
whether search results are written back into generation artifacts
whether explicit comparison and fallback artifacts appear
whether autonomous_deep expands earlier or deeper than autonomous_steady
